name: Project Task List
description: Manages a lightweight to-do list of project-level tasks (not AI tasks) — items that can be added, completed, and removed per project. Persisted per-project with async load/save.

Managers/ProjectTaskManager.cs.content:
class ProjectTaskManager
  LoadTasksAsync() -> Task
  SaveTasks() -> void
  SaveTasksAsync() -> Task
  AddTask(string text) -> ProjectTaskItem
  CompleteTask(ProjectTaskItem task) -> void
  RemoveTask(ProjectTaskItem task) -> void

patterns: Async JSON load/save with background write
